name: markivo
description: Premium Progressive Web App E-commerce Marketplace

scripts.dev: yarn workspace apps/frontend dev & yarn workspace apps/backend dev
scripts.build: yarn workspace apps/frontend build && yarn workspace apps/backend build
scripts.start: yarn workspace apps/backend start & yarn workspace apps/frontend start
scripts.lint: yarn workspace apps/frontend lint && yarn workspace apps/backend lint
scripts.type-check: yarn workspace apps/frontend type-check && yarn workspace apps/backend type-check
